chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Appeal.No.31 of 2024 Appellant: Ramash alias Raju S/o Amro through Mr. Abdul Hameed, Advocate The State: Through Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. P.G Date of hearing: 01.10.2025 Date of Judgment 01.10.2025 Dr. Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah, J,- Appellant Ramash alias Raju has impugned the judgment dated 21.12.2023 passed by learned II- Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi Central, for offence under Sections 376 PPC, whereby after full-fledged trial, the appellant was convicted and sentenced to suffer RI 10 years and fine Rs.50,000/- and in default of payment fine, he shall further undergo for SI 3 months more. Appellant was also extended benefit of section 382-B Cr.P.C. 2. I have heard the counsel for appellant and perused the record. 3. After hearing at-length, learned counsel does not press the instant appeal as appellant has already completed his sentence and has been released on 12.8.2025 as per Jail Roll and Report dated 22.9.2025 submitted by Senior Superintendent, Central Prison and Correctional Facility, Karachi 4. Instant Cr. Appeal stands dismissed as become infructuous. JUDGE asim/PA
